# Cluster Expansion Model Estimation

## Generation of energy data file from derivative structure calculations
```shell
# > cat fcc-primitive
# Generated by pyclupan
# 4.0
#   0.000000000  0.5000000000  0.5000000000
#   0.5000000000  0.000000000  0.5000000000
#   0.5000000000  0.5000000000  0.000000000
#  Ag
#   1
# Direct
#   0.000000000 0.000000000 0.000000000

> pyclupan-utils -p fcc-primitive -v $path_dft/*/vasprun.xml
```
By collecting DFT data, `energy.dat` file is generated.
The unitcell structure is used to evaluate the energy per unitcell.
The generated `energy.dat` contain the energy values in eV/unitcell.

## Model Estimation from energy and cluster function data
```shell
> pyclupan-regression -e energy.dat -f pyclupan_features.hdf5
```
